testcase.name: Papers Management › filters papers by status
testcase.system-out:
BROWSER: [HMR] connected BROWSER: [Fast Refresh] rebuilding BROWSER: [Fast Refresh] done in 2234ms BROWSER: [API Request] GET /api/papers Mock API hit: http://localhost:8000/api/papers?search=&category=all&status=all&sortBy=uploadedAt&sortOrder=desc&page=1&limit=20&total=0&totalPages=0 Mocking GET papers list BROWSER: [API Response] GET /api/papers - 200 BROWSER: [HMR] connected BROWSER: [Fast Refresh] rebuilding BROWSER: [Fast Refresh] done in 459ms BROWSER: [Fast Refresh] rebuilding BROWSER: [Fast Refresh] done in 142ms BROWSER: [API Request] GET /api/papers Mock API hit: http://localhost:8000/api/papers?search=&category=all&status=all&sortBy=uploadedAt&sortOrder=desc&page=1&limit=20&total=5&totalPages=1 Mocking GET papers list BROWSER: [API Response] GET /api/papers - 200 BROWSER: [API Request] GET /api/papers Mock API hit: http://localhost:8000/api/papers?search=&category=all&status=processing&sortBy=uploadedAt&sortOrder=desc&page=1&limit=20&total=5&totalPages=1 Mocking GET papers list BROWSER: [API Response] GET /api/papers - 200 Found 1 processed cards First card HTML:
BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

Jacob Devlin, Ming-Wei Chang, Kenton Lee 等 4 位作者

Context Engineering处理中

We introduce a new language representation model called BERT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers. Unlike recent language representation models, BERT is designed to pre-train deep bidirectional representations from unlabeled text by jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers. As a result, the pre-trained BERT model can be fine-tuned with just one additional output layer to create state-of-the-art models for a wide range of tasks, such as question answering and language inference, without substantial task-specific architecture modifications.

1.50 MB2018NAACL
2024-01-03 08:00
查看
